analysis_result: 1/18 MPNST samples harbor EED non-synonymous somatic mutations.
discrepancy_analysis: Reported result (1 of 18 MPNSTs, 6%) matches model result (1/18 MPNST samples) exactly. Both the numerator (1) and denominator (18) are identical, yielding the same proportion (~5.56%, rounded to 6% in paper). Concordance is within the +/-10% relative difference threshold (0% relative difference).
